text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Summer camp has finally arrived! It's a special
time that's perfectly suited for effective training!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Some students are feeling nervous, but
Matikanetannhauser, on the other hand...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
There's only one thing to do while traveling on a
bus!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
The thrilling Umapyoi ☆ Word Association game!
Yay!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Pyoi Pyoi! ♪ You say summer, I say hot!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: You say hot, I say sauna!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: You say sauna, I say... ummm...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Oh my. Hehe, this game is quite difficult.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
The trick is not to think! It's about reacting. You
need to react with a pyoi!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Yeah! Like this! You say sauna...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: No, no, no. You already said "hot."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Full of lively Umamusume, the bus cruises towards
the camp.
